description: A customer is browsing a product page. The system should display personalized recommendations for related products.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product the customer is currently viewing.

expected_outcome.expected: System identifies the current product SKU.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the customer's browsing history and past purchases.

expected_outcome.expected: System retrieves the customer's activity data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of recommended products based on collaborative filtering ('customers who bought this also bought...').

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a relevant list of 3-5 product recommendations.
